title: Interface band
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Interface_Band.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Atton Rand]] wearing an interface band]]
'''Interface bands''' were a primitive form of [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] construct and were used during the days of the [[Old Sith Wars]]. They wrapped around the user's skull and allowed a direct mental connection to a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] system.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
